description:
🕒 14:00–16:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-chokotto-tenranzan-syoka/

Would you like to walk with a guide and discover natural changes you might normally miss on an ordinary walk? This tour is designed to be easy and enjoyable in a short amount of time. Please feel free to join us. Depending on the season, we also give away homemade pesticide-free vegetables!

【Fee】2,000 yen per person; 1,500 yen for repeat visitors; 4,000 yen per family (includes guide fee and insurance)

【Capacity】10 people

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno Ecotourism Citizen Guide Association, Wildlife Group)

【What to bring】Drinking water, rain gear, backpack or similar (recommended to keep both hands free), towel
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
